function_declarations.name: memory_init
function_declarations.description: Initialize ultra-memory session. Call at conversation start to create three-layer memory structure and inject historical context.

resume.description: Try to resume the most recent session for this project

function_declarations.name: memory_status
function_declarations.description: Query current session status: operation count, last milestone, context pressure level (low/medium/high/critical). Use to decide when to compress.

function_declarations.name: memory_log
function_declarations.description: Record an operation to the current session log (Layer 1). Call after every significant action: file write, bash command, tool call, decision, error, or milestone.

op_type.description: Operation type: one of tool_call, file_write, file_read, bash_exec, reasoning, user_instruction, decision, error, milestone

detail.description: Detail fields (optional). Special sub-fields: profile_update {key:value} triggers profile conflict detection; knowledge_entry {title,content} triggers knowledge conflict detection; path for file ops; cmd for bash ops

function_declarations.name: memory_recall
function_declarations.description: Retrieve relevant records from all memory layers (ops log, summary, semantic, entity index). Use when you need to recall past work, decisions, or errors.

function_declarations.name: memory_summarize
function_declarations.description: Trigger summary compression of the current session (compresses ops log into summary.md). Call when context pressure is high or critical, or every ~50 operations.

force.description: Force compression even if operation count is low

function_declarations.name: memory_restore
function_declarations.description: Restore the last session context for a project. Use at conversation start to continue a previous task across days.

function_declarations.name: memory_profile
function_declarations.description: Read or update user profile (tech stack, preferences, project list). Persist user-level preferences across all sessions.

function_declarations.name: memory_entities
function_declarations.description: Query structured entity index (functions, files, dependencies, decisions, errors). Use for precise questions like 'which functions were used', 'which packages were installed', 'what decisions were made'.

entity_type.description: Entity type filter: function, file, dependency, decision, error, class, or all (no filter)

query.description: Search keyword (optional, empty returns all of that type)

function_declarations.name: memory_extract_entities
function_declarations.description: Re-extract all structured entities from a session's ops log. Use to repair or initialize the entity index.

function_declarations.name: memory_knowledge_add
function_declarations.description: Append important information to the knowledge base for future retrieval. Use when: solving a tricky bug, making a key tech decision, discovering a tool usage tip, or completing a reusable code pattern.
